message:
🐛 URL-encode brackets in GitHub edit links

GitHub requires `[` and `]` to be URL-encoded as `%5B` and `%5D`
in paths. Without encoding, links to files in Next.js dynamic
route folders like `[locale]` would fail.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
